=Module <<a_api_type | module Response >> =
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Response>>>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api text=".." | module Response >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>>
----
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code" id="TYPEt"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|type>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|t>>>><<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<a_api text="Body" | module Response.Body >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api text=".." | module Response.Body >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>><<pre id="VALmake" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|make>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?body: >><<a_api text="Body.t" | type Response.Body.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?cookies: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_cookie_map>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Response>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Make a response from a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Cohttp~.~Response~.t>>~. ~Note that the
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|transfer~-encoding>> header is not taken into account if it is set to
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|chunked>>~, use <<a_api | val Response.add_header >>~. ~This is because <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Cohttp~.~Response~.make>> sets
    this header by default~, which interferes with the transfer~-encoding carried
    by the <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|body>>~.
>>
<<pre id="VALrespond" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|respond>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?headers: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Header>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| status: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Http>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Status>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?body: >><<a_api text="Body.t" | type Response.Body.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Like <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make>> but with an interface similar to
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Cohttp~_lwt~_unix~.~Server~.respond>>~.
>>
<<pre id="VALrespond_string" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|respond~_string>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?headers: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Header>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| status: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Http>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Status>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| body: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Like <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|respond>> but with a fixed string body~.
>>
<<pre id="VALrespond_error" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|respond~_error>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?headers: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Header>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?status: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Http>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Status>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| body: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_warning"|Deprecated>>~Use <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|respond~_string>> with a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~~status>> argument instead~.
~Like <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|respond~_string>> with <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"~Error~: ">> appended to the body~. ~The default
    status is <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|`~Internal~_server~_error>>~.
>>
<<pre id="VALrespond_file" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|respond~_file>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?headers: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Header>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?status: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Http>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Status>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Respond with the content of a file~. ~The content type is guessed using
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Magic~_mime>>~.
>>
<<pre id="VALupdate" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|update>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?response: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Response>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?body: >><<a_api text="Body.t" | type Response.Body.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?cookies: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_cookie_map>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >>>>>><<pre id="VALof_cohttp" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|of~_cohttp>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?cookies: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_cookie_map>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Response>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> * <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp_lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Body>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >>>>>><<pre id="VALto_response_expert" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|to~_response~_expert>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Response>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> * <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>'ic <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lwt_io>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|output_channel>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Response for <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Cohttp~_lwt~_unix~.~Server~.make~_expert>>~. ~Set cookie headers~.
>>
<<pre id="VALresponse" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|response>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Response>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Raw response without cookie headers set~.
>>
<<pre id="VALbody" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|body>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="Body.t" | type Response.Body.t >>>>>><<pre id="VALstatus" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|status>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Code>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|status>>>>>><<pre id="VALset_status" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|set~_status>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Code>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|status>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >>>>>><<pre id="VALcookies" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|cookies>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_cookie_map>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>>>>>><<pre id="VALadd_cookies" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|add~_cookies>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_cookie_map>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >>>>>><<pre id="VALheader" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|header>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_http>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Header>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Name>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> string option>>>><<pre id="VALheader_multi" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|header~_multi>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_http>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Header>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Name>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> string list>>>><<pre id="VALadd_header" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|add~_header>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_http>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Header>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Name>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >>>>>><<pre id="VALadd_header_multi" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|add~_header~_multi>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_http>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Header>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Name>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> string list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >>>>>><<pre id="VALreplace_header" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|replace~_header>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_http>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Header>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Name>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >>>>>><<pre id="VALreplace_headers" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|replace~_headers>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_http>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Header>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Name>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> * string<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >>>>>><<pre id="VALremove_header" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|remove~_header>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_http>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Header>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Name>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.t >>>>>>
